rationale: Ground truth is an uncontested 'lgtm' approve on a pure rename; X matches this outcome with grounded verification (confirmed no stale references, confirmed alignment with upstream's actual attribute name/call site) and clear, concrete evidence. Y instead issues a REQUEST CHANGES verdict over a self-tagged '[minor]' test-coverage nitpick (missing test for the chat-completion fallback path) that is not itself a bug introduced by this diff, contradicting its own severity label and the actual merged outcome; it also renders the identical comment three times, undermining reliability.
